programme.desc: The lineup of Singer 2025 once again features renowned artists from the Greater China region and beyond. The featuring singers include: Mickey Guyton, Beni, Shan Yi Chun, Terry Lin, Zhou Yan, Janice Vidal, Joyce Cheng, Christine Fan, A-Lin etc.

programme.title: Foodie Sisters - EP 9
programme.desc: Foodie Sisters Xiao and May embarked on a food challenge to bring viewers to different corner of Taiwan in search of good tasting food from places like Keelong, Xinzhu and Taoyuan.

programme.title: Captive Heart - EP 3
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Thai) FanXuan is indifferent to WanLe and refuses to eat the food she prepares. Zhao LiJuan meets WanLe and publicly humilates her in front of others.

programme.title: Captive Heart - EP 4
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Thai) FanXuan finds out that the bandit HuPo is actually his senior from the same sect, but HuPo denies it. FanXuan has frequent nightmares about a horrific childhood incident.

programme.title: News Tonight - EP 88
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: The Tale Of Nokdu - EP 11
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Quan Ludou initially wants to rescue his brother, but his brother not only refuses to leave with him but also blames everything on Quan Ludou.

programme.title: Love Endures - EP 19
programme.desc: The story revolves around seven lifelong companions who reside in the same area, relying on and supporting each other through their toughest times. They undergo separation and reunite years later.

programme.title: Singer 2026 - EP 5
programme.desc: Live. Raw. Real. Week after week, every Singer bares their soul on stage. No tricks. Just voice. Just heart. Just greatness. Let's witness.

programme.title: As Beautiful As You - EP 27
programme.desc: Han Ting invites Ji Xing to accompany him to an important social function, placing their relationship under the spotlight for the first time. As rumours begin circulating among guests, both must decide whether to clarify the truth or simply let others speculate.

programme.title: Genius Go Go Go - EP 223
programme.desc: This large-scale variety show gathers showbiz entertainers to challenge each other in various hilarious educational games. Viewers at home are also encouraged to get in on the fun and try out the games with friends in real life!

programme.title: Love Endures - EP 20
programme.desc: The story revolves around seven lifelong companions who reside in the same area, relying on and supporting each other through their toughest times. They undergo separation and reunite years later.

programme.title: The Escape of the Seven - EP 10
programme.desc: The 7 individuals were all involved in the heated case of a missing girl. As they attempt to escape their fate and pursue the truth, they find themselves embroiled in secrets, lies, and desires in this retribution tale.

programme.title: Billionaire Story - EP 480
programme.desc: A street separates two worlds. On one side, there is a hard-working life in the market with both hardships and laughter; one the other, it's the life of rich and wealthy families who are intriguing and trembling.

programme.title: Singer 2026 - EP 5
programme.desc: Live. Raw. Real. Week after week, every Singer bares their soul on stage. No tricks. Just voice. Just heart. Just greatness. Let's witness.

programme.title: A Journey to Love - EP 6
programme.desc: Ren Ruyi officially joins Ning Yuanzhou's group on their journey to An. Although her skills prove invaluable, the others remain wary of her motives. When bandits strike along the way, her decisive actions save the day and prompt Ning Yuanzhou to reassess the mysterious newcomer.

programme.title: The Ringmaster - EP 14
programme.desc: A major competition offers Ching-lam the chance to prove his progress, but victory is overshadowed by new revelations that challenge everything he has believed. As emotions run high, old rivalries threaten to resurface.

programme.desc: Lei Kin finds herself caught between protecting someone she cares about and revealing the truth she has kept hidden for years. Her decision could alter the course of Ching-lam's investigation forever.

programme.desc: A street separates two worlds. On one side, there is a hard-working life in the market with both hardships and laughter; one the other, it's the life of rich and wealthy families who are intriguing and trembling.

programme.title: James' Going Places - EP 92
programme.desc: Join James, the host with outstanding culinary skills and an appetite for good food, as he explores markets and savours local delicacies in Taiwan!

programme.desc: Get ready for some serious fun with one of Taiwan's most popular outdoor variety shows! Golden Bell Award-winning hosts Jacky Wu and KID travel all over Taiwan and other parts of the world alongside celebrity guests to compete in races and complete missions.

programme.desc: Catch all the fun and laughter right here as we bring you Taiwan's top-grossing variety entertainment show that will keep you wanting for more!

programme.title: Perfect Match - EP 82
programme.desc: Perfect Match is a highly-rated large-scale dating variety show that connects eligible bachelors to bachelorettes in China. programme.title: Bath Buddy

As he finds unexpected family warmth, his memory returns, forcing him to choose between betrayal and brotherhood.

programme.title: Hello, Saturday - EP 107

programme.desc: On the wings of the wind, the sisters soar, chasing dreams with courage, growing with every step on stage. In Ride the Wind 2026, women from all walks of life unite, breaking boundaries through performance after performance, blooming into their most radiant selves.

programme.title: Jasa Boleh Disewa, Kalo Hati Jangan
programme.desc: Cahaya's (Larasati Nugroho) life goal is to make her sister happy. One day, Laras meets Adit (Rizki Alatas). They're both in a hurry, and their paper bags get swapped. Rizki's paper bag is for his fiancée, a beautiful ring. Laras's paper bag contains a simple bracelet.

programme.title: LIGA DANGDUT 2021 - EP 71
programme.desc: 70 Ambassadors from 34 Provinces compete for the Champion of the Largest Dangdut Competition in Indonesia. Best display, spectacular stage.

programme.title: Ada Kalanya Cinta Melipir Dari Hati Duluan
programme.desc: Wulan (Jennifer Eve) helps a pickpocket escape from a mob, and strangely enough, Wulan even tricks the pickpocket several times by returning the stolen wallets to their owners. But suddenly Wulan decides to cosplay as Ninin, a beautiful girl who works in a widower's house. Strangely, there Ninin claims to be the widower's fiancée. With determination, Ninin persists, despite facing criticism from some people who have been close to the widower (Ridho Illahi).

programme.title: TERCYDUK - EP 61
programme.desc: This reality show investigates the root causes of various dramatic and emotionally draining personal and social cases. Then find a way out to help the parties who are victims

programme.title: Ngga Usah Ngadi Ngadi Nanti Kamu Jatuh Hati
programme.desc: Derry broke up with Vina after they had a fight and misunderstanding. Derry, who was now closer to Elsa, helped Elsa sell roasted corn. Derry's father, who found out about this, was angry with Derry and forbade him from approaching Elsa again. He preferred if Derry was with Vina. According to Derry's father, the hotel's image would be damaged if Derry remained with Elsa and helped Elsa sell roasted corn.

programme.title: THE SULTAN ENTERTAINMENT - EP 9
programme.desc: The Sultan is a talk show featuring two sultan-like hosts: Sultan Andara and Raffi Ahmad and Sultan Bintaro and Andre Taulany, accompanied by a cast of beautiful and handsome employees. It features spectacular guest stars and is definitely not to be missed. Find out more at The Sultan Entertainment.

programme.title: ARJUNA CINTANYA GAK PERNAH BERCHANDYA
programme.desc: Ayu (Nabila Zavira) already has a boyfriend, but her father, who loves Javanese puppetry, doesn't like her boyfriend. Then, Ayu meets a handsome young man wearing an Anoman costume, but Ayu thinks he's playing a trick on her. It turns out that while she's undergoing training for a teacher promotion, Ayu meets the young man who loves Javanese art again, and their suitcases even get swapped.

programme.title: TAJWID CINTA - EP 10
programme.desc: Dafri returns to Indonesia with a joyful heart, ready to get engaged to his girlfriend, Alina. However, his life takes a drastic detour when a girl named Syifa is left stranded at the altar after her own fiancé, Ilham, mysteriously vanishes. Out of an immense debt of gratitude owed to Syifa's family, Dafri's father forces Dafri into an arranged marriage with Syifa instead. Bound to a stranger, the two must navigate a stormy marriage filled with resentment and endless conflicts.

programme.title: Jadian Sama Cewek Duren ACC Sayang
programme.desc: Ken (Cakrawala Airawan) harbors a severe phobia of durians; the mere smell of the fruit leaves him nauseous or completely unconscious. In a cruel twist of fate, he is forced to deal with Ulfa (Shanice Margaretha), the daughter of a wealthy durian plantation tycoon. Repelled by her family's trade, Ken vows to stay as far away from Ulfa as humanly possible.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 36
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 182
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

Bound to a stranger, the two must navigate a stormy marriage filled with resentment and endless conflicts.

programme.title: Cinta Tak Perlu Dibagi Jangan Ya Dek Ya
programme.desc: Driven by a secret mission to reclaim her family's lost plantation from the powerful Pak Hendra, Rina (Jennifer Eve) infiltrates his wealthy household in Jakarta. Using her charm and polite demeanor, she successfully captures the hearts of Hendra's two sons, Damar (Royano Kevin) and Nando (Masaji Wijayanto). While a genuine romance sparks between Rina and Nando, a massive family rift explodes when Damar confesses his own feelings, leading to a catastrophic event that shatters Rina's relationship

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 37
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 183
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: JODOH GAK ADA YANG TEMPE

programme.title: ARJUNA CINTANYA GAK PERNAH BERCHANDYA
programme.desc: Ayu (Nabila Zavira) already has a boyfriend, but her father, who loves Javanese puppetry, doesn't like her boyfriend. Then, Ayu meets a handsome young man wearing an Anoman costume, but Ayu thinks he's playing a trick on her. It turns out that while she's undergoing training for a teacher promotion, Ayu meets the young man who loves Javanese art again, and their suitcases even get swapped.

programme.title: TAJWID CINTA - EP 11
programme.desc: Dafri returns to Indonesia with a joyful heart, ready to get engaged to his girlfriend, Alina. However, his life takes a drastic detour when a girl named Syifa is left stranded at the altar after her own fiancé, Ilham, mysteriously vanishes. Out of an immense debt of gratitude owed to Syifa's family, Dafri's father forces Dafri into an arranged marriage with Syifa instead. Bound to a stranger, the two must navigate a stormy marriage filled with resentment and endless conflicts.

programme.title: Jadian Sama Cewek Duren ACC Sayang
programme.desc: Ken (Cakrawala Airawan) harbors a severe phobia of durians; the mere smell of the fruit leaves him nauseous or completely unconscious. In a cruel twist of fate, he is forced to deal with Ulfa (Shanice Margaretha), the daughter of a wealthy durian plantation tycoon. Repelled by her family's trade, Ken vows to stay as far away from Ulfa as humanly possible.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 37
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: AKU TERPISANG PISANG PADA PANDANGAN PERTAMA
programme.desc: Thomas (Lucky Perdana) nearly gets into a terrible accident due to Nadya’s (Shanice Margaretha) reckless driving as she speeds down the road in a banana cargo truck. To his absolute horror, Thomas later discovers that Nadya is the primary banana supplier for his mother’s bakery business. Furious about the roadside encounter, Thomas demands his mother cut all professional ties with the dangerous driver

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 184
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Aku Terlalu Sah Buat Kamu Yang Gelisah
programme.desc: Rangga (Hardi Fadhillah) is completely miserable and unable to move on after being dumped by his girlfriend. Haunted by memories of his ex, he hires Rara (Ina Marika), a professional relationship consultant, to help him erase his past. However, despite her best strategies and efforts, Rangga's stubborn heart refuses to cooperate, making him Rara's toughest case yet

programme.title: TAJWID CINTA - EP 12
programme.desc: Dafri returns to Indonesia with a joyful heart, ready to get engaged to his girlfriend, Alina. However, his life takes a drastic detour when a girl named Syifa is left stranded at the altar after her own fiancé, Ilham, mysteriously vanishes. Out of an immense debt of gratitude owed to Syifa's family, Dafri's father forces Dafri into an arranged marriage with Syifa instead. Bound to a stranger, the two must navigate a stormy marriage filled with resentment and endless conflicts.

programme.title: Romantika Cinta Jangan Ya Dek Ya
programme.desc: The arrival of a beautiful new teacher, Intan (Larasati Nugroho), instantly captivates a young student named Ferdi (Dimas Putra). Ferdi's older brother, Fahmi (El Ryan Carlen)—who also teaches at the school—strictly forbids the crush, arguing that Ferdi is far too young. However, as Fahmi and Intan are continuously paired up for school projects, they genuinely fall for each other, igniting a furious sibling rivalry as Ferdi accuses his brother of betrayal.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 38
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. programme.desc: Saksikan Alif Farhan & Ain Edruce bersama tetamu jemputan mereka yang pasti kecoh sambil merungkai video-video pelik yang 'trending' pada minggu ini.

programme.title: Isteri VS. Tunang - EP 16
programme.desc: Alana Sofea, seorang gadis yang berterus terang, mencabar ego Zaim Azfar, seorang lelaki yang sombong dan angkuh, lalu membawa mereka ke dalam perkahwinan yang tidak dijangka.

programme.title: Keluarga Iskandar - EP 14

programme.title: Cik Serba Tahu - EP 7

programme.title: 3 dara kg.com - EP 19
programme.desc: 3 Dara nak buat bisnes produk kecantikan sendiri menggunakan modal pinjaman dari Tabung JKK Kampung Kembang Kempis. Mereka ditipu oleh Kulup Q , di mana duit dah dibayar tetapi barang tak dapat.

programme.title: Motif Sosial? - EP 26
programme.desc: Kesinambungan Motif Viral, kali ini melalui eksperimen sosial yang viral dengan penampilan selebriti undangan.

programme.title: Punchline - EP 22
programme.desc: Lebih meriah, lebih kecoh! Saksikan program variasi terbaharu yang menampilkan Dato' AC Mizal beraksi bersama PS Mansur dan tetamu jemputan yang bakal membuat anda tidak kering gusi!

programme.title: Frust Gila - EP 8

programme.title: Kail Pagi Makan Petang - EP 5

programme.desc: Sitcom komedi yang berkisahkan kehidupan masyarakat yang tinggal di kampung dan bandar dengan isu-isu yang berbangkit lakonan Ajak, Yassin dan Shuib

programme.title: Jutawan Ekspres - EP 4

programme.title: Sembang Teh Tarik S3 - EP 8

programme.desc: Joras & Stars ialah sketsa yang menampilkan artis jemputan setiap minggu untuk menghiburkan penonton melalui sketsa yang kelakar.

programme.desc: Himpunan sketsa komedi pendek pecah perut yang menggabungkan selebriti tanah air terdiri daripada pelawak,pelakon,penyanyi dan pempengaruh media sosial .

programme.title: Warung Sepahtu - EP 9
programme.desc: Jep, Shuib, Rahim & Pakya akan bersembang di Warung sepahtu bersama tetamu undangan mereka.

programme.title: Lawak Tak Lagho - EP 11
programme.desc: Istimewa bersama pakar motivasi Samsul Debat dan barisan pelawak, saksikan mereka berkongsi kisah menarik dan lucu bersama penonton.

programme.title: Berita Hangit - EP 9
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Arena Panggang - EP 6
programme.desc: Siapakah yang paling handal memanggang dan siapakah yang bakal dipanggang?

programme.desc: Kiah membina kumpulan baru untuk menguruskan perniagaan Ikan Pekasamnya,dia juga dilatih dan dilantik menjadi seorang ejen rahsia.

programme.title: Elak Elak - EP 1
programme.desc: Rancangan menarik untuk tontonan anda semua.

programme.title: Tanya Sama Pokok - EP 1
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang kehidupan di sebuah kampung moden yang sudah semakin terdedah dengan kemodenan tetapi dalam waktu yang sama masih mengekalkan ciri-ciri hidup berkampung.

programme.title: Jep & Judin - EP 3
programme.desc: Jep dan Judin adik-beradik tiri yang lurus bendul meminati sukan bermotor. Jep mahu jadi Johan Rempit dan Judin mahu menolongnya mencapai mimpi itu. [Episod ini tamat tempoh pada 21/11/13]

programme.title: Kalau Berani Kampung Stail - EP 12
programme.desc: Setiap minggu Sherry dan ketua kumpulan akan di bawa ke kampung yang berlainan bersama artis jemputan untuk menolong ketua kumpulan memenangi perlawanan mingguan

programme.title: Layan Je Super Spontan - EP 1
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan komedi untuk tontonan semua.

programme.desc: Rancangan komedi berdiri yang dihoskan oleh satu-satunya Douglas Lim yang menampilkan 3 persembahan setiap episod.

programme.desc: Rancangan komedi yang penuh gelak tawa untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Berita Hangit - EP 9

programme.title: The Cadets - EP 4
programme.desc: Mengisahkan perjuangan empat sekawan - Amir, Farah, Hakim dan Liz - untuk membuktikan bahawa pasukan mereka mampu mengatasi segala cabaran untuk mewakili Kadet bomba di Kem Jamboree Kebangsaan.

programme.title: Gerak Geri GenZ - EP 4
programme.desc: Sebuah eksplorasi 4 sahabat remaja perempuan Cik B, Ara, Alyssa dan Qadejah di Turki. Mereka menelusuri kota bersejarah dan budaya.

programme.title: The Chosen One 2024 - EP 4
programme.desc: Saksikan kehebatan bakat-bakat muda yang akan mempersembahkan nyanyian terbaik mereka di bawah bimbingan barisan penyanyi terkemuka tanahair sebagai coach!

programme.title: Hikayat Bawang Putih Bawang Merah - EP 4
programme.desc: Bawang Putih tinggal bersama ibu tiri dan adik tiri dan setiap hari didera. Putih melarikan diri dan bertembung dengan Putera rupawan di dalam hutan Inderaloka.

programme.title: Travel Lawak - EP 8
programme.desc: Sebuah program travelog yang menampilkan tiga pelawak popular iaitu Syuk, Sharif Zero dan Mamak Puteh di mana mereka akan mengembara ke luar negara dan meneroka sendiri budaya dan tempat-tempat menarik.

programme.title: Prankap Show - EP 7
programme.desc: Saksikan selebriti popular merancang "prank" bersama geng mereka dan mengenakan mangsa terpilih. Berjayakan perancangan "prank" mereka? Sama-sama kita nantikan!

programme.title: baikpunya - EP 2
programme.desc: Program ini akan membawa anda dalam perjalanan untuk mengetahui tempat-tempat tersembunyi dan tempat-tempat popular di Malaysia yang disyorkan oleh penduduk tempatan.

programme.title: The Maid 2 - EP 6
programme.desc: Suhana, Nadia, dan Fika baru saja diceraikan Jay. Harta mereka telah berpindah milik kepada Jay setelah Jay berjaya pedayakan mereka tandatangani surat yang mereka tidak tahu pun isi kandungannya.

programme.title: Jangan Lupa Janji - EP 4
programme.desc: Mikail memarahi Ikmal kerana menceritakan sejarah keluaraga mereka di media sosial. Ikmal meminta maaf kepada Mona kerana dia tidak berterus terang tentang hal dirinya dibuang kerja.

programme.title: Sepenggal Puisi - EP 7
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang konflik 2 buah keluarga, satu di Yogyakarta dan satu di Kuala Lumpur. Rahsia yang di simpan selama 30 tahun terbongkar apabila Fariz ke Yogyakarta untuk mendapatkan kepastian.

programme.title: Aku Bukan BIMBO - EP 6
programme.desc: Elsuraya percaya Azad adalah punca kematian ibu bapanya dalam satu kemalangan dan membenci lelaki itu yang dalam diam mencintainya. Perkara sebenar disimpan rapi oleh Azad dan sahabat baiknya, Dani Ikram.

programme.title: Rahsia Hati Perempuan - EP 9
programme.desc: Mikael, Zayn & Ilaina adalah kawan baik semenjak kecil. Ilaina dan keluarga telah berpindah ke Australia. Berputik cinta antara mereka dan siapakah Arissa?

programme.title: DramaVaganza: Dendam Cinta Arissa - EP 24
programme.desc: Perkahwinan Arissa & Zariman musnah apabila Rafeal melanggar Zariman dan melarikan diri untuk mengejar isterinya. Ingin jujur pada Arissa namun Rafeael jatuh cinta dengan Arissa tanpa sengaja.

programme.title: Bunga Hati - EP 12
programme.desc: Seorang gadis miskin berdepan dengan konflik antara ibu yang membencinya dan abangnya yang cacat serta terperangkap dalam cinta tiga segi antara kekasih pertama dan doktor jutawan.

programme.title: Tearsucker
programme.desc: Beberapa wanita bergelut secara emosi apabila berdepan seorang lelaki psikopat yang ingin menyedut air mata mereka.

programme.title: Fantasy Escape - EP 4
programme.desc: Sebuah program yang merealisasikan impian peminat bertuah untuk melakukan aktiviti yang mereka gemari bersama selebriti pilihan mereka yang turut berkongsi pengalaman dan memberi motivasi.

programme.title: Plan Cinta Tak Jadi - EP 7
programme.desc: Plan Cinta Tak Jadi mengisahkan tentang pertolongan yang dihulur atas dasar persahabatan akhirnya membuahkan rasa cinta.

programme.title: Mr London Ms Langkawi - EP 8
programme.desc: Aidid yang di besarkan di luar negara bertemu sepupunya Nana, yang berjiwa besar cintakan tanah air. Walaupun mereka sering berselisih pendapat namun akhirnya disatukan atas kehendak keluarga.

programme.title: Kak Kek Ke Kelate - EP 3
programme.desc: Kak Kek, alter ego Catriona Ross akan menjelajah ke Kelantan untuk mencari makanan viral di Kelantan di samping membawa penonton meneroka keunikan dan tempat menarik yang ada.

programme.title: Rahsia Hati Perempuan - EP 10
programme.desc: Mikael, Zayn & Ilaina adalah kawan baik semenjak kecil. Ilaina dan keluarga telah berpindah ke Australia. Berputik cinta antara mereka dan siapakah Arissa?

programme.title: Jangan Lupa Janji - EP 4
programme.desc: Mikail memarahi Ikmal kerana menceritakan sejarah keluaraga mereka di media sosial. Ikmal meminta maaf kepada Mona kerana dia tidak berterus terang tentang hal dirinya dibuang kerja.

programme.title: Murder By Moonlight - EP 4
programme.desc: Ben dan Mindy pergi ke dalam hutan untuk mencari seorang Penunggu? Dato Karnain dan Datin Saloma ikut untuk memastikan mereka tidak menipu.

programme.title: Tiada Hari yang Tak Indah - EP 4
programme.desc: Kisah tentang kehidupan keluarga Hj. Zainal yang mempunyai 3 orang anak perempuan dengan perwatakan yang berbeza. Mereka menghadapi masalah seperti hal keluarga, percintaan, dan persahabatan.

programme.title: The Maid 2 - EP 7
programme.desc: Kehidupan Jay dan empat orang isterinya nampak bahagia namun hakikatnya isteri – isterinya saling membenci. Konflik terjadi apabila isteri ke-4 dibunuh. Siapakah pembunuhnya?

programme.title: Roda Panas - EP 3
programme.desc: Roda Panas menunjukkan dunia automotif mengenai enjin, roda dan aktiviti yang berkaitan.

programme.title: Teroka Lokal - EP 9
programme.desc: Teroka Lokal adalah program travelog dengan hos selebriti yang akan mengembara untuk mencari tempat-tempat tersembunyi yang menarik di Malaysia.

programme.title: Pung Pang Rizalman - EP 6
programme.desc: Program masakan bersama Dato' Rizalman Ibrahim yang turut menampilkan selebriti-selebriti terkemuka di Malaysia.

programme.title: Kutinggalkan Cinta di Okinawa - EP 12
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang Alisa yang cuba untuk menjejaki ibu kandungnya. Sepanjang perjalanan itu dia mengenali Raykal dan Shun. Siapakah di antara dua lelaki ini yang dapat memenangi hati Alisa?

programme.title: Strawberi Karipap Musim 3 - EP 7
programme.desc: Nini dan Haikal iaitu adik beradik tiri menjadi bosan apabila asyik bertukar rumah, justeru mereka merancang untuk menyatukan Hairi dan Lisa iaitu penjaga sementara mereka.

programme.title: Jangan Lupa Janji - EP 5
programme.desc: Ikmal merasa sedikit cemburu apabila merasakan Mikail semakin mesra dengan Mawar. Mikail masih cuba merahsiakan tempat dia bekerja daripada pengetahuan Ikmal. Raihana tidak dapat berjumpa dengan Ikmal.

programme.title: BARISTA: Misi Terpaling Sulit - EP 4
programme.desc: Perisik legenda dan penganalisis kutu buku, yang merupakan saingan sengit, bekerjasama untuk menjejaki ejen bermuka dua yang mengancam agensi penyiasatan dan mereka mendedahkan konspirasi di luar jangkaan

programme.title: Geng Mak-Mak - EP 4
programme.desc: Geng Mak Mak menceritakan kisah seorang bakal ibu, Dahlia yang cuba belajar untuk menjadi seorang ibu yang terbaik untuk anaknya daripada 4 orang sahabat yang juga bergelar ibu.

programme.title: Tiada Hari yang Tak Indah - EP 4
programme.desc: Kisah tentang kehidupan keluarga Hj. Zainal yang mempunyai 3 orang anak perempuan dengan perwatakan yang berbeza. Mereka menghadapi masalah seperti hal keluarga, percintaan, dan persahabatan.

programme.title: Maskulin: Who's Your Bro - EP 9
programme.desc: Rancangan realiti kecergasan penuh adrenalin yang mendefinisikan persaudaraan lelaki! 12 peserta dari pelbagai latar belakang akan berdepan cabaran fizikal dan emosi serta pemikiran strategik.

programme.title: A Simple Favor
programme.desc: Stephanie adalah seorang blogger juga ibu tunggal di pekan kecil. Satu hari, rakan baiknya hilang sebaik saja meminta pertolongan Stephanie. Dia akhirnya menyiasat kehilangan rakannya.

programme.title: baikpunya - EP 3
programme.desc: Program ini akan membawa anda dalam perjalanan untuk mengetahui tempat-tempat tersembunyi dan tempat-tempat popular di Malaysia yang disyorkan oleh penduduk tempatan.

programme.title: The Maid 2 - EP 7
programme.desc: Suhana, Nadia, dan Fika baru saja diceraikan Jay. Harta mereka telah berpindah milik kepada Jay setelah Jay berjaya pedayakan mereka tandatangani surat yang mereka tidak tahu pun isi kandungannya.

programme.title: Jangan Lupa Janji - EP 5
programme.desc: Ikmal merasa sedikit cemburu apabila merasakan Mikail semakin mesra dengan Mawar. Mikail masih cuba merahsiakan tempat dia bekerja daripada pengetahuan Ikmal. Raihana tidak dapat berjumpa dengan Ikmal.

programme.title: Sepenggal Puisi - EP 8
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang konflik 2 buah keluarga, satu di Yogyakarta dan satu di Kuala Lumpur. Rahsia yang di simpan selama 30 tahun terbongkar apabila Fariz ke Yogyakarta untuk mendapatkan kepastian.

programme.title: Aku Bukan BIMBO - EP 7
programme.desc: Elsuraya percaya Azad adalah punca kematian ibu bapanya dalam satu kemalangan dan membenci lelaki itu yang dalam diam mencintainya. Perkara sebenar disimpan rapi oleh Azad dan sahabat baiknya, Dani Ikram.

programme.title: Rahsia Hati Perempuan - EP 10
programme.desc: Mikael, Zayn & Ilaina adalah kawan baik semenjak kecil. Ilaina dan keluarga telah berpindah ke Australia. Berputik cinta antara mereka dan siapakah Arissa?

programme.title: DramaVaganza: Dendam Cinta Arissa - EP 25
programme.desc: Perkahwinan Arissa & Zariman musnah apabila Rafeal melanggar Zariman dan melarikan diri untuk mengejar isterinya. Ingin jujur pada Arissa namun Rafeael jatuh cinta dengan Arissa tanpa sengaja.

programme.title: Gen F - EP 8
programme.desc: 12 pereka fesyen terpilih dari Malaysia, Indonesia dan Singapura akan bersaing setiap minggu untuk menghasilkan rekaan terbaik mereka.

programme.title: Kampung Boy S2 - EP 12
programme.desc: Nikmati animasi terbaik hasil nukilan Dato' Lat yang penuh kreatif lagi menghiburkan ini istimewa untuk tontonan anda sekeluarga!

programme.title: Hard to Heart S3 - EP 10
programme.desc: Program temubual bersama artis tersohor, mengenai jatuh bangun mereka dalam sepanjang terbabit dengan kerjaya seni tempatan.

programme.title: Maskulin: Who's Your Bro - EP 9
programme.desc: Rancangan realiti kecergasan penuh adrenalin yang mendefinisikan persaudaraan lelaki! 12 peserta dari pelbagai latar belakang akan berdepan cabaran fizikal dan emosi serta pemikiran strategik.

programme.title: Murder By Moonlight - EP 1
programme.desc: Malam sebelum PKP pertama, hotel memutuskan untuk mengadakan parti untuk tetamu yang ada. Ada banyak drama yang diperhatikan semasa parti itu.

programme.title: Murder By Moonlight - EP 2
programme.desc: Bella dan Julia tiba di hotel dengan identiti palsu. Pada masa yang sama, Ameera mula menyiasat kematian Tuan Osman. Di samping itu, Jit, Sangeetha dan Datuk Karnain juga sangat mencurigakan!

programme.title: Murder By Moonlight - EP 3
programme.desc: Sangeetha mempunyai motif tetapi tidak ingat apa yang berlaku pada malam Tuan Osman meninggal. Semasa dia cuba ingat kembali, Ameera pula sedang mendalami penyiasatannya sendiri.

programme.title: Murder By Moonlight - EP 4
programme.desc: Ben dan Mindy pergi ke dalam hutan untuk mencari seorang Penunggu? Dato Karnain dan Datin Saloma ikut untuk memastikan mereka tidak menipu.

programme.title: Perang Jantina - EP 6
programme.desc: Pasukan lelaki dan pasukan wanita bersaing antara satu sama lain menyelesaikan tugasan dan cabaran untuk membuktikan jantina mana yang lebih unggul.

programme.title: Next To Neelofa - EP 1
programme.desc: Program bual bicara Neelofa bakal membincangkan secara mendalam beberapa topik merangkumi kesihatan, kesejahteraan, cinta, kecantikan & gaya, perihal wanita, keibubapaan, perhubungan dan kerjaya.

programme.title: Mael Lambong
programme.desc: Kehidupan seorang penarik kereta mula berubah apabila dia membantu seorang wanita muda dari sekumpulan penjahat, yang mengejarnya untuk mendapatkan mikrocip yang mengandungi maklumat penting kerajaan.

programme.title: Dalang Prank - EP 8
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan hiburan prank yang melibatkan artis dan peserta yang menjadi dalang kepada prank masing-masing. Prank yang disukai oleh penonton akan dinobatkan Juara Dalang Prank dalam setiap episod.

programme.title: Ready Set Action S2 - EP 12
programme.desc: Travelog artis-artis tempatan membawa peminat bertuahnya untuk meneroka tempat ikonik yang pernah menjadi lokasi latar belakang adegan filem terkenal dalam Ready, Set, Action! musim ke 2.

programme.title: RASA Anak Emak Anak Bapak - EP 7
programme.desc: Program masakan ini memerlukan selebriti jemputan membawa ibu atau bapa mereka menjelajah Malaysia bagi merasa sendiri masakan kegemaran ibu bapa masing-masing.

programme.title: Solo Yolo : Checklist - EP 2
programme.desc: Program perjalanan realiti mengenai eksplorasi solo ke beberapa negara, untuk mengalami keunikan pemandangan dan aktiviti tempat di tempat yang dilawati.

programme.title: Casa Impiana - EP 1
programme.desc: Program hiasan yang akan memaparkan keunikan dan keindahan rumah yang dibuat sendiri oleh pemiliknya. Tuan rumah berkongsi rahsia cara untuk mencantikkan rumah dari segi idea, petua dan citarasa peribadi.

programme.title: Sesat - EP 12
programme.desc: Sesat, rancangan yang menguji minda dan ikhtiar hidup selebriti tempatan dalam mencari destinasi yang ditetapkan.

programme.title: Bintang Minggu Ini SR 2 - EP 7
programme.desc: Saksikan konsert dari artis artis popular terus ke rumah anda.

programme.title: Yuna Bintang Di Langit - EP 4
programme.desc: Ikuti perjalanan Yuna dalam merealisasikan impiannya.

programme.title: Dr. Pontianak - EP 2
programme.desc: Dr.Vivy terkejut mendapati dirinya terbangun di sebuah longkang. Lebih pelik bila Dr.Vivy mampu melihat Edna, penunggu hospital. Lebih pelik lagi, kewujudan paku di leher Dr.Vivy.

programme.title: Belles Comptines D'afrique - EP 47

programme.title: Les Gardes Chimeres - EP 41
programme.desc: Wendy and Thelma are spending the summer holidays at their grandfather's house in the heart of nature. As city dwellers, they're worried about getting bored. But this summer, the two sisters discover that their grandfather's estate is more than just a park: it is home to chimeras, amazing creatures with magical powers.

programme.title: Les Gardes Chimeres - EP 42
programme.desc: Wendy and Thelma are spending the summer holidays at their grandfather's house in the heart of nature. As city dwellers, they're worried about getting bored. But this summer, the two sisters discover that their grandfather's estate is more than just a park: it is home to chimeras, amazing creatures with magical powers.

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Magazine
programme.desc: TV5MONDE, the global French language network, offers the best television programmes from France, Belgium, Switzerland and Canada.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Cesar Wagner - EP 6
programme.desc: In the Vosges forest the authorities find the lifeless body of a journalist and animal rights activist, along with that of a lynx. The local hunters immediately become the prime suspects. A tragedy that exacerbates an already virulent conflict between hunters and the animal rights movement.

programme.title: Geopolitis
programme.desc: Analysis, explanations, neutrality... ''Geopolitis'' offers an unbiased in-depth look at international current affairs, with accuracy, precision and a constant desire to make an increasingly complex and conflictual world easier to understand.

programme.title: Le Monde Apres Nous
programme.desc: In Paris, Labidi shares a small single-room apartment and survives thanks to scamming and part-time jobs. He dreams of being a writer, but when he meets elisa he is forced to reconsider his lifestyle.

programme.title: 47 Pouces
programme.desc: One night, seven-year-old Zelie sees her Aunt Clara arrive at the family home. The young woman is sad, has bandages on her wrists and does not leave her room.

programme.title: A La Fontaine
programme.desc: Alice is at a crucial stage of her high school life: she has to determine her future career and choose a university. Stressed, she turns to her favorite teacher and her best friend, Julien. But Julien does not answer her messages.

programme.title: Kevine Et Fortune
programme.desc: Yaounde, in Cameroon. Kevine and Fortune, two inseparable friends, play on the same first division football team. They fight to be recognized and to fulfil their dream: to play in a foreign club. But while Kevine signs with FC Nantes, Fortune must stay in the country.

programme.title: Gracia, La Messi De Bangui
programme.desc: At 18, Gracia has a dream: to become a footballer. Her passion puts her in constant conflict with those around her, women's football is still a controversial subject in the Central African Republic. Girls like her are called ''Koli-Wali'' (tomboys). But Gracia doesn't care, she just wants to play.

programme.title: Itineraires Paysans - EP 10
programme.desc: The different attitudes and approaches of French farmers in terms of the environment, economy and landscape. A practical way of understanding a region and its terroir through their working practices.

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: Allons-Y Franco !
programme.desc: Every Friday, journalists from the French-language media and TV5MONDE's partner channels share their views on current affairs.

programme.title: L'invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: Magazine
programme.desc: TV5MONDE, the global French language network, offers the best television programmes from France, Belgium, Switzerland and Canada.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rtbf
programme.desc: Complete international news roundup presented by the RTBF news staff.

programme.title: Interieurs - EP 20
programme.desc: In Lyon and Marseille, Anne-Catherine Verwaerde visits various flea markets in search of the best treasures for bargain hunters.

programme.title: Pistes Vertes - EP 21
programme.desc: In the Pays d'Auge, Marion welcomes visitors into her home, where dozens of domestic animals are present. With soaring raw material prices, the construction sector is seeking to combat waste. Caen is installing beehives to protect bees.

programme.title: Le Journal Afrique
programme.desc: All the African news from the TV5MONDE news staff.

programme.title: L'actu
programme.desc: The televised news programme from TVMonaco.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rts
programme.desc: All the news from RTS.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (8 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: Allons-Y Franco !
programme.desc: Every Friday, journalists from the French-language media and TV5MONDE's partner channels share their views on current affairs.

programme.title: L'invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: Yetili - EP 9
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees ready to read them a story.

programme.title: Yetili - EP 10
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees ready to read them a story.

programme.title: Dessine Les Animaux Avec Koumi - EP 11
programme.desc: Koumi is 6 years old, mischievous and always full of fun. The dream of her life is to know all the animals of the world, and she absolutely loves drawing! In each episode she explains how to draw animals really well.

programme.title: Dessine Les Animaux Avec Koumi - EP 12
programme.desc: Koumi is 6 years old, mischievous and always full of fun. The dream of her life is to know all the animals of the world, and she absolutely loves drawing! In each episode she explains how to draw animals really well.

programme.title: C'est Mathematique ! Avec Iman - EP 9
programme.desc: Iman, a former maths teacher, offers primary school pupils a survival kit to help them approach secondary school with confidence. In each episode, using a fun and educational approach, he aims to make his subject clear and practical.

programme.title: Ta Vie Sans Ca - EP 47
programme.desc: What would life be like without our most everyday objects? Each episode puts a different one in the spotlight. Whether a tap, an umbrella or a toothbrush, they all have a story to tell about their invention and subsequent evolution.

programme.title: Les Jeux De La Fontaine - EP 12
programme.desc: The lively wolves' team confronts a more sedate but very well-organised tortoise team in the sitting volleyball competition.

programme.title: Belfort Et Lupin - EP 9
programme.desc: Belfort, the king's dog, and Lupin, the wolf of the gardens, live in the Palace of Versailles. As inseparable as they are unlikely, they come to the rescue of all their furry and feathered friends, from the royal menagerie to the local wildlife.

programme.title: Les Triples - EP 54
programme.desc: The triplets may look like angels, but they're not the last to get up to mischief... The two brothers and the sister are inseparable and as loving as they are mischievous. The adults need to be brave to channel their energy!

programme.title: Potobot - EP 35
programme.desc: Twelve year-old Chloe is feeling somewhat disillusioned. Then Potobot, a little robot arrives from the future with a mission for her: to change the world and make the future a better place. There's no doubt about it, working together, one step after another, the two of them can move mountains!

programme.title: L'aventure Du Monde Des Mondes - EP 45
programme.desc: Dimitri, Raph's and Anais's uncle, is a French globetrotter who is fascinated by nature. He gives them tasks to stimulate their creativity. Thanks to Blox, a small robot, they access the ''world of the worlds'', a secret fantasy place where they can play and learn.

programme.title: Foot Go - EP 5
programme.desc: Eight year-old Tata arrives in a new school. She wants to join its football team but isn't allowed to; after all she's a girl! Refusing to be beaten, Tata decides to set up her own girls' team with the help of her gang of friends.

programme.title: Marocains Du Ciel - EP 5
programme.desc: Abdelwahed tells his daughter the story of the sage Abbas Ibn Firnas. Despite the obstacles he encountered on his path, he never gave up or allowed others to tarnish his reputation.

programme.title: Mission Info
programme.desc: News programme aimed at 7 to 11-year-olds! Each episode, devised for children and their parents, provides insight accessible to younger ones, combined with explanations, immersive reports and expert interviews. An educational quiz also gives children the chance to test their knowledge in a fun way.

programme.title: Magazine
programme.desc: TV5MONDE, the global French language network, offers the best television programmes from France, Belgium, Switzerland and Canada.

programme.title: Falo
programme.desc: A news magazine show, ''Falo'' discusses and analyses current affairs in depth.

programme.title: Magazine
programme.desc: TV5MONDE, the global French language network, offers the best television programmes from France, Belgium, Switzerland and Canada.

programme.title: L'echappee Belge - EP 5
programme.desc: Host Zoe Brunet and Adrien cross the Tarentaise by mountain bike and kayak. From Val d'Isere to Bourg-Saint-Maurice, they criss-cross the Vanoise National Park in a sumptuous Alpine setting.

programme.title: Le Magazine De La Riviera
programme.desc: The magazine programme all about the art of living in Monaco, Provence and on the Cote d'Azur.

programme.title: Suisse En Scene
programme.desc: Interview with a key figure from the Swiss cultural scene. An opportunity to look back at their life and career, and the foundations that underpin their work.

programme.title: Rassemblance - EP 11
programme.desc: Sourdough breads, brioches and generous recipes are the keys to his success on social networks. Known under the pseudonym Cook as you feel it, Kodjo is a self-taught cook who arrived from Togo in France. A father and inspiring creator, he turns a childhood passion into a space for emancipation.

programme.title: Le Match Dans Le Match - EP 92
programme.desc: She's French, world champion and Olympic champion in windsurfing, multiple European champion: Charline Picon is Pierre Classen's guest.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Generation F - EP 15
programme.desc: Fashion, food, sport, urban culture, lifestyle... The artist Richard Orlinski explores the French touch. Between Dakar, London and Montreal, he meets a new generation of creators and puts the spotlight on a bold and uninhibited French-speaking world.

programme.title: Hep Taxi !
programme.desc: In town or in the countryside, day or night, Jerome Colin, the presenter-taxi driver leads his prestigious customer on a four-wheel journey conducive to secrets.

programme.title: Guides D'aventures - EP 8
programme.desc: In France, Nathalie Lasselin welcomes cave diving enthusiasts. Together they explore an abandoned limestone quarry in Saint-Meme-les-Carrieres, before discovering the famous Le Ressel cave. Renowned for its incredible network of underground karst passages, the Lot is one of the world's leading areas for cave diving.

programme.title: Peaux Noires : Quel Heritage ? - EP 4
programme.desc: What intimate and social relationship do Black French-speaking people have with their skin color? Through personal testimonies, expert contributions and innovative visual staging, the series explores the historical and cultural evolution of the representation of Black skin.

programme.title: Tendance Xxi
programme.desc: French creativity is booming in the fields of fashion, crafts, design, beauty and gastronomy. 'Tendance XXI' showcases a know-how that evolves in tune with the times, sometimes even anticipating them.

programme.title: Version Francaise - EP 14
programme.desc: The Albert-Kahn museum unveils the banker's humanist project. Sometimes called ''the time folder'', Simone Pheulpin works with cotton ribbon. For his first show at Dries Van Noten, Julian Klausner plays with textures and colours. Sophie Brillouet's studio is alive with beach air.

programme.title: Questions Pour Un Champion
programme.desc: A general knowledge quiz.

programme.title: A Boire Et A Manger - EP 2
programme.desc: Lindsay Brun, Remi-Pierre Paquin and Vanessa Pilon have invited Marie-Soleil Dion and Louis-Olivier Mauffette to join them, in a chateau, no less. Wines from the Fragments vineyard to quench their thirst and meat from the Brylee farm to ensure no-one goes hungry!

programme.title: Parlons Eco
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's new economic news bulletin, presented by Vicky Bogaert. ''Parlons eco'' analyses today's major trends and interviews the men and women who are starting businesses, innovating and imagining the economy of tomorrow.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Le Grand Echiquier
programme.desc: Singers, musicians, dancers, choreographers and young talent all come together to share the prestigious stage of the ''Grand echiquier''; turning it into the largest concert venue in France, just for the time of the programme.

programme.title: Maman A Disparu
programme.desc: Louise and Celine, two sisters separated by life, meet again after the suspicious disappearance of their mother. As the local police investigate the case, the sisters, despite their very different characters, are convinced that she didn't just disappear without reason and decide to work together on their own investigation.

programme.title: Movie - Simmaraasi
programme.desc: A man's campaign against the caste system earns him much respect from the villagers. Years later, his son who has joined the village goon returns from the city with an arrest warrant for his father.

programme.title: Movie - Thulli Thirintha Kaalam
programme.desc: Khushboo faces several difficulties when she tries to discipline a group of youngsters who are idlers and always cause huge embarrassment to their families.

programme.title: Movie - Sengaathu
programme.desc: Two closely related families fall apart over a member of one family giving witness against a person belonging to the other in a murder trial. Their relationship deteriorates further from there.

programme.title: Movie - Senthooram
programme.desc: Muthu, a village chief, adopts Rosa, an orphan, and takes care of her. When Rosa gets married to Kattalai, Muthu tries to cause problems for the couple.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: Fillers

programme.title: Movie - Chocolate
programme.desc: Aravind, a college student, falls in love with the newcomer Anjali, unaware that she is the daughter of the commissioner of police and his acquaintance, Jayachandran.

programme.title: Movie - Endrum Anbudan
programme.desc: Thyagu, a singer and music instructor, lives as a tenant where a young woman is a co-tenant. Their lives change when Thyagu shares shocking information about his past.

programme.title: Movie - Therkku Theru Machan
programme.desc: Subramani loves Parimala, who is from a different village. Devraj, who wants to marry Parimala, tries to separate the lovers. When all fails, he succeeds in forming a rivalry between the two villages.

programme.title: Movie - Ranga
programme.desc: Ranga, who was once a nice man, plans to kidnap a young boy while Raju, a former crook, decides to protect him. However, things change when their shared past is revealed.

programme.title: Movie - Thiruvilayadal Arambam
programme.desc: Guru hatches several plans to separate Priya and her lover Thirukumaran. However, each time Thirukumaran successfully manages to escape from Guru's evil plans and traps him in another problem.

programme.title: Movie - Aasal
programme.desc: Two brothers envy their step-brother Shiva as he is their father's favourite. Since their plan to deal in drugs and arms is opposed by Shiva, the two brothers hatch a devious plan to bump him off.

programme.title: Movie - Sevarkodi
programme.desc: Kali agrees to get his sister Valli married to the rich but old Annachi for his money. However, Valli elopes with Bala, her lover. Infuriated, Kali swears revenge.

programme.title: Movie - Sindanai Sei
programme.desc: Aadhi meets his childhood friends in the city who too struggle to make both ends meet. Together, they successfully execute a bank robbery. But they get killed one after the other after the robbery.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: Fillers

programme.title: Movie - Pongalo Pongal
programme.desc: Subbu and his four friends are jobless and loathed by their fathers. After losing money in a scam, they start a business with their college mate Chitra's help. But her rich father has different plans.

programme.title: Movie - Aanai
programme.desc: A police officer is suspended despite his honesty. Now, he serves as bodyguard to the daughter of a singer. When the girl is kidnapped, the bodyguard is suspected, lest he proves his innocence.

programme.title: Movie - MR.Bharath
programme.desc: Businessman Gopinath abandons Shanti, his first love, to marry a rich heiress. Later, Bharath, Gopinath and Shanti's illegitimate son, seeks revenge from him for the injustice meted out to his mother.

programme.title: Movie - Ambasamuthiram Ambani
programme.desc: A poor guy meets a girl who falls for him but he is more focused on achieving his dreams. He buys a plot that is under construction, for his supermarket. However, before he can take it over, the owner dies and things take a turn.

programme.title: Movie - Surya Vamsam
programme.desc: Sakthivel, an influential man, is upset with his son Chinnarasu's careless attitude. He is further infuriated when Chinnarasu suddenly refuses to marry his cousin, Gowri.

programme.title: WTA Tour 2026
programme.desc: The Bad Homburg Open is a women's professional tennis tournament held on outdoor grass courts at the Bad Homburg Tennis Club in Bad Homburg, Germany. Players compete for over $1.1 million in total prize money. The champion receives a unique, custom-crafted brass Elephant Trophy with a silver tennis ball in its trunk.

programme.title: ASO Cycling Programming 2026
programme.desc: Catch all the exhilarating moments from Stage 1 of the Tour of Oman where cyclists begin at the Ministry of Tourism and finish at the Bimmah Sink Hole.

programme.title: ASO Cycling Programming 2026
programme.desc: Catch breathtaking moments from Stage 2 of the Tour of Oman where cyclists start at the Al Rustaq Fort and finish at Yitti Hills.

programme.title: ASO Cycling Programming 2026
programme.desc: Relive the intensity from Stage 3 of the Tour of Oman where cyclists make their way from the Eastern Mountain to Samail.

programme.title: PGA Tour 2026
programme.desc: The Travelers Championship is a professional golf tournament on the PGA Tour in Cromwell, Connecticut, a suburb south of Hartford. Since 1984 the tournament has been held at TPC River Highlands. The tournament was founded 73 years ago in 1952. Over the last decade, longer hitters have done well at the tournament, with Stewart Cink, Hunter Mahan, J. J. Henry, Phil Mickelson, and Bubba Watson combining for six victories over a 10-year span.

programme.title: Heroines 2026
programme.desc: Heroines is a timeless series, that tables important discussion that challenges the status quo and celebrates the unique values of women’s sport. Each episode features a dedicated theme such as equality, maternity, leadership, mental health, fan engagement, activism and more, supported by exclusive interviews with leaders at the forefront of women’s sport.

programme.title: WTA Tour 2026
programme.desc: The Nottingham Open is an annual professional tennis tournament held at the Nottingham Tennis Centre in the United Kingdom. The event was founded in 1887. It features 32 singles players and is an important stop on the road to Wimbledon.

programme.title: WTA All Access 2026
programme.desc: This show brings you compelling stories, player personalities, tournament colour and fan engagement as well as exclusive analysis of statistical trends and data.

programme.title: WTA Tour 2026
programme.desc: The Eastbourne Open is a tennis tournament held annually at the historic Devonshire Park Lawn Tennis Club in Eastbourne, UK. Held since 1974, Devonshire Park is one of the oldest tennis venues in the world, renowned for having some of the finest grass courts on the tour.

programme.title: BWF Thomas & Uber Cup Finals 2026
programme.desc: The Thomas & Uber Cup are the pinnacle of international team badminton, bringing together the world's top nations to battle for the prestigious titles. The Thomas Cup was first staged in 1948-49, and the Uber Cup was added for the first time in 1956-7. The Thomas Cup is the prize awarded for the World Men's Team Championships, while the Uber Cup is the prize for the World Women's Team Championships.

programme.title: PGA Tour 2026
programme.desc: The Travelers Championship is a professional golf tournament on the PGA Tour in Cromwell, Connecticut, a suburb south of Hartford. Since 1984 the tournament has been held at TPC River Highlands. The tournament was founded 73 years ago in 1952. Over the last decade, longer hitters have done well at the tournament, with Stewart Cink, Hunter Mahan, J. J. Henry, Phil Mickelson, and Bubba Watson combining for six victories over a 10-year span.

programme.title: DP World Tour 2026 Open d'Italia Day 2
programme.desc: The Italian Open is the men's national open golf championship of Italy. It was founded in 1925. The format of the Italian Open is a standard stroke play event played over 72 holes with a cut after 36 holes. The last Italian man to win his national championship is Francesco Molinari, who did so in 2006 and 2016, but he is the only local winner since 1980.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON - 2025/2026 (ARS)
programme.desc: As we wave goodbye to another action-packed and compelling Premier League campaign, Review of the Season takes you through the twists and turns of a gripping last 10 months. From how the title was won, the fight for European spots, and the battle to avoid relegation - all the key moments are covered from another scintillating season.

programme.title: PL WORLD BEATERS - EP 1
programme.desc: A strand that heroes the Premier League stars who could play leading roles for their national teams competing in the FIFA World Cup 2026 this summer. Through wide-ranging interview, these films tell each player's individual story, their journey to stardom and the impact they could make for their nations on the world's biggest stage. Featuring Matheus Cunha, Granit Xhaka, Florian Wirtz and Antoine Semenyo.

programme.title: PL GOATS - EP 5
programme.desc: Premier League legend Tim Howard takes on the ultimate challenge, ranking the 10 greatest US players to play in the Premier League. But there's a twist; from his carefully selected list, he must crown one as the Ultimate Premier League USA GOAT.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 4
programme.desc: Soaring Seagulls' tells the incredible story of Brighton & Hove Albion; from the brink of collapse and years in the lower leagues to becoming one of the Premier League's smartest and most admired clubs. Featuring interviews with the key figures behind Brighton's rise, alongside celebrity fans who followed every twist along the way, this documentary charts a remarkable journey of survival, ambition and one of the greatest comebacks in modern football.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 3
programme.desc: We spend the day with Julian Dicks as he reflects on a career that made him one of the Premier League's toughest and most uncompromising defenders. Best known for his time at West Ham United, Dicks looks back on the highs, rivalries and intensity of football in the 1990s, as well as the reputation that made him a cult hero with fans. Now coaching at Chelmsford City, we see a different side to the former hardman as he passes on his experience to the next generation, while reflecting on the moment

programme.title: REVIEW - TUE 25 NOV
programme.desc: Review covers all the action from Matchweek 12, kicking off with Burnley hosting Chelsea, Liverpool taking on Forest, and then for the game of the weekend, we look to North London as Arsenal face-off against Spurs.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 2
programme.desc: Ahead of the World Cup, we revisit the rise of current USA manager Mauricio Pochettino's unforgettable Tottenham Hotspur side; the team that transformed Spurs from top-four hopefuls into genuine challengers at home and in Europe. Playing fearless, high-intensity football and built around a young core of stars, Pochettino's Spurs came within touching distance of Premier League and Champions League glory, creating some of the club's greatest modern nights along the way. Through exclusive interview

Featuring interviews with the key figures behind Brighton's rise, alongside celebrity fans who followed every twist along the way, this documentary charts a remarkable journey of survival, ambition and one of the greatest comebacks in modern football.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 3
programme.desc: We spend the day with Julian Dicks as he reflects on a career that made him one of the Premier League's toughest and most uncompromising defenders. Best known for his time at West Ham United, Dicks looks back on the highs, rivalries and intensity of football in the 1990s, as well as the reputation that made him a cult hero with fans. Now coaching at Chelmsford City, we see a different side to the former hardman as he passes on his experience to the next generation, while reflecting on the moment

programme.title: REVIEW - TUE 25 NOV
programme.desc: Review covers all the action from Matchweek 12, kicking off with Burnley hosting Chelsea, Liverpool taking on Forest, and then for the game of the weekend, we look to North London as Arsenal face-off against Spurs.

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 2
programme.desc: Tim Howard spent a decade as Everton's first choice goalkeeper, the club that defined his Premier League career. The American recalls his journey from New Jersey, via Old Trafford, to Goodison Park, and his most memorable moments between the posts.

programme.title: Liverpool vs Bournemouth (MW01) - EP 1
programme.desc: Liverpool are unbeaten on the opening day in the last 12 PL seasons (W9, D3) - the longest ongoing run in PL.

programme.title: Manchester United vs Burnley (MW03) - EP 23
programme.desc: Manchester United have lost just one of their last 25 home games against Burnley in all competitions (W15 D9), going down 2-0 in January 2020.

programme.title: West Ham United vs Chelsea (MW02) - EP 11
programme.desc: Chelsea have won five of their last seven Premier League meetings with West Ham United (D1 L1), and overall have 32 wins in the competition against the Hammers, only beating Spurs more often (37).

programme.title: Manchester City vs Burnley (MW06) - EP 55
programme.desc: Burnley are winless in their last 19 league visits to Manchester City (D6 L13) since a 5-2 win in March 1963. The Clarets have lost each of their last seven Premier League games at the Etihad Stadium.

programme.title: Arsenal vs Leeds United (MW02) - EP 16
programme.desc: Arsenal are unbeaten in their last 14 meetings with Leeds in all competitions (W12 D2), winning each of the last six in a row.

programme.title: Newcastle United vs Liverpool (MW02) - EP 20
programme.desc: Newcastle haven’t scored in any of their last four Premier League matches without Alexander Isak featuring (D2 L2), having 47 shots and accumulating an xG of 5.57 without scoring in these games.

programme.title: Liverpool vs Bournemouth (MW01) - EP 1
programme.desc: Liverpool are unbeaten on the opening day in the last 12 PL seasons (W9, D3) - the longest ongoing run in PL.

programme.title: Manchester United vs Burnley (MW03) - EP 23

programme.title: Arsenal vs Leeds United (MW02) - EP 16
programme.desc: Arsenal are unbeaten in their last 14 meetings with Leeds in all competitions (W12 D2), winning each of the last six in a row.

programme.title: Newcastle United vs Liverpool (MW02) - EP 20
programme.desc: Newcastle haven’t scored in any of their last four Premier League matches without Alexander Isak featuring (D2 L2), having 47 shots and accumulating an xG of 5.57 without scoring in these games.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Amanda Lino vs. Rizlen Zouak
programme.desc: This episode features a women's banthamweight championship as Amanda 'Mad Dog' Lino and Rizlen 'The Lioness of the Atlas' Zouak fight their way to Fight of the Night honors. Bonus coverage showcases more striking power with Mzawandile Hlongwa vs. Robert Swanepoel and Steve Nwosu vs. Quinton Rossouw. From EFC 70 in Sibaya Casino, Durbin, South Africa on 26-May-2018.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Edison Miranda vs. Willie Gibbs
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features Super Middleweights Edison Miranda (26-2, 23 KOs) vs. Willie 'The Gladiator' Gibbs (20-1, 16 KOs) from the Miccosukee Indian Gaming Resort in Miami, Florida, USA. Bonus coverage includes Jason Litzau, aka 'The American Boy' (20-1, 18 KOs) vs. Jose Hernandez (21-3, 13 KOs).

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Jermain Taylor vs. Jeff Lacy
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features former Middleweight Champion Jermain 'Bad Intentions' Taylor (27-2, 17 KOs) in a back and forth battle with Jeff "Left Hook' Lacy (24-1, 17 KOs) in a WBC Super Middleweight Title Eliminator on November 15, 2008 from the Vanderbilt University Memorial Gymnasium in Nashville, Tennessee, USA.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The seasons's best runs are spotlighted.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Juan Manuel Marquez vs. Michael Katsidis
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a highly-praised and hard-hitting lightweight championship fight featuring Juan Manuel Marquez and Michael Katsidis that was named HBO's 2010 Fight of the Year. Also on the card, welterweight champion Victor Ortiz.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Episode 5 from from Ryogoku Kokugikan in Tokyo, Japan features Shodai, Takayasu, Tobizaru and Takakeisho.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Saul (Canelo) Alvarez vs. Kermit Cintron
programme.desc: This episode features Saul (Canelo) Alvarez defending the WBC light middleweight title against Kermit Cintron, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: Bipolar Rock n' Roller
programme.desc: A raw and unflinching account of Mauro Ranallo's decades-long struggle with Bipolar Affective Disorder. The voice of WWE and Showtime Championship Boxing, Ranallo has called some of the biggest sports events in history - all the while fighting his own epic battles with mental health Follow his journey in this 3-part series, as he combats the stigma behind mental health issues and sheds light on what it's like being at the top of the industry despite seemingly insurmountable odds. Directed by H

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: This episode features highlights from the Men's Forms Championship at the ISKA US Open Championships held at Disney World, Orlando, FL, USA.

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode, we see the best of the Judo Grand Slam from Baku and the #2 world ranked fighter, Michael Korrell, talks judo.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Andre Berto vs. Freddy Hernandez
programme.desc: The main event in this episode sees Andre Berto defend the WBC welterweight championship against Freddy Hernandez. With one quick, hard right hand to the face in the first round, this bout comes to a sudden halt. Berto looks to keep his undefeated streak alive and thrust himself into talks for bigger fights with the likes of stars such as Floyd Mayweather. Also on the card, Jean Pascal looks for an upset in the light heavyweight division.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo

Episode 1 from Ryogoku Kokugikan in Tokyo, Japan features Takakeisho, Onosho, Kotoshoho and Daieisho.

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode, we see the best of the Judo Grand Slam from Baku and the #2 world ranked fighter, Michael Korrell, talks judo.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Andre Berto vs. Freddy Hernandez
programme.desc: The main event in this episode sees Andre Berto defend the WBC welterweight championship against Freddy Hernandez. With one quick, hard right hand to the face in the first round, this bout comes to a sudden halt. Berto looks to keep his undefeated streak alive and thrust himself into talks for bigger fights with the likes of stars such as Floyd Mayweather. Also on the card, Jean Pascal looks for an upset in the light heavyweight division.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Episode 1 from Ryogoku Kokugikan in Tokyo, Japan features Takakeisho, Onosho, Kotoshoho and Daieisho.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Victor Ortiz vs. Marcos Rene Maidana
programme.desc: This episode features a Super Lightweight bloody battle between Marcos Rene Maidana making his US debut and a very young Victor Ortiz, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: Bipolar Rock n' Roller
programme.desc: A raw and unflinching account of Mauro Ranallo's decades-long struggle with Bipolar Affective Disorder. The voice of WWE and Showtime Championship Boxing, Ranallo has called some of the biggest sports events in history - all the while fighting his own epic battles with mental health Follow his journey in this 3-part series, as he combats the stigma behind mental health issues and sheds light on what it's like being at the top of the industry despite seemingly insurmountable odds. Directed by H

programme.title: Teletubbies S01 - EP 74
programme.desc: It's a windy day and the Teletubbies collect lots of leaves that have blown off the trees. The leaves go everywhere in Home Dome, so The Noo-­Noo cleans up.

programme.title: Yakka Dee S06 - EP 8
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'frog', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see green, brown, hopping and croaking frogs, and one with a really long tongue! Dee looks for a frog that's hiding and then relaxes with a clam frog. The journey is repeated with some special surprises along the way, and everyone has a boogie when Dee's friend finally succeeds in saying today's word.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO S01 - EP 6
programme.desc: Captain Messy plays pirates with his toys in a bowl of water, but why does his rubber duck float instead of sink?

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 45
programme.desc: Fabio's yummy new sauce is so sticky that he gets stuck to Mojo's bonnet. They have to do everything together until Bo figures out how to 'unsticky' that sauce!

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 43
programme.desc: At the chemist, Bluey and Bingo have fun playing with the CCTV screens.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 44
programme.desc: Coco wants to play Wild Girls with Indy, but Chloe wants her to play another game.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 19
programme.desc: From sensible chuckles and nervous giggles to Duggee's infectious laughter, once everyone starts, it's so hard to stop. What were they laughing about again? Anyone remember?

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 18
programme.desc: What are the rules about being in charge? Make a plan, keep everyone happy, make decisions, lead by example and listen. Roly takes that one so seriously he gets a bit overwhelmed.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 14
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered what goes on at the Squirrel Club when the sun goes down?

programme.desc: Join the chickens in space for the big finale of Agony and Eggstacy! Mucho Suspense!

programme.desc: The Go Jetters are relaxing by the Dead Sea when Grandmaster Glitch causes a custard catastrophe - to the Vroomster!

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 39
programme.desc: A sleepover with their cousin means Bluey and Bingo get to stay up late! But when Muffin shows up exhausted after missing her nap, the girls get more fun than they bargained for.

programme.title: Bluey S02 - EP 42
programme.desc: When Muffin can't stop sucking her thumb, she has to wear a cone of shame. But the cone gets in her way and she can no longer play `sandwich shop' with Bluey and Bingo.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 10
programme.desc: Dad tries to teach Bluey how to play chess, but Mum thinks she is still too young. When Bingo joins in, the kids make up their own rules, but they still can't beat Dad.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 11
programme.desc: Dad agrees to play Sheepdog with Bluey and Bingo to stop them from disturbing Mum who is taking a well-earned rest, but looking after a sheep is harder work than they expected.

programme.title: Andy's Safari Adventures S01 - EP 33
programme.desc: When the Snare's penguins at Safari World get caked in mud, Andy jets off to New Zealand to find out how these forest dwelling penguins get clean.

programme.title: Playtime Towers S01 - EP 14
programme.desc: It's a hot day in Playtime Towers, so Bella helps Lift cool down with a paper fan. Together, they visit Hettie in the Ice Disco, who has a flapping paper fan dance!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 14
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn that friends can be like an extended family, earning their Family Photo Badges and a brilliant group picture in the process!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 13
programme.desc: Tag's feeling grumpy because he didn't eat his breakfast, uh-oh! Luckily Duggee has his Breakfast Badge, and soon the Squirrels will too.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 12
programme.desc: The Squirrels have fun learning what opposites are, with a little bit of help from a lot of topsy-turvy animal friends!

programme.desc: Glitch takes all of the colourful powder from the Festival of Colour in Dwarka, India. Can the Go Jetters get it back?

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 24

programme.desc: Darcy the tunnel boring machine makes some mistakes on her first day, but she soon makes up for it when everyone sees what she can really do.

programme.desc: Mars tries to fill in for a missing Moon, but needs a little coaching from Sarah and Duck.

programme.desc: Sarah and Duck try to help Donkey get his jumping confidence back by building a surprise for him in their back garden.

programme.desc: There's a funny noise around town. It's distracting the children's music practice and keeping everyone else up. Stanley investigates with the help of Myrtle.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 25
programme.desc: Stanley helps Hattie, Fred, and Fifi with a new food delivery service. It starts well, except with each delivery a problem arises. Stanley must solve them before Myrtle's party.

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals S01 - EP 10
programme.desc: From snails called David to Daddy Spider Longlegs', the funny animals talk about all things creepy and crawly.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran S02 - EP 3
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran press a flower so that it will last for a long time. JoJo learns that flowers wilt over time but flower pressing is a special way to make them last longer.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 40
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo would rather explore their holiday hotel room than relax on the beach.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 41
programme.desc: On a trip to the beach, Mum teaches Bluey to throw, while Bingo and Dad get creative with a funny shaped stick.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 41
programme.desc: Bluey wants to know why Dad's always bossing her around.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 42
programme.desc: The Squirrels find a hidden book about mythical creatures. They learn and discover a wide range of mythical creatures, create their own and find out why the book was hidden in the first place.

programme.desc: More fun with Duggee, biscuits, eggs, toys and of course milkshakes.

programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits Theatre, Tomato changes colour.

programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Laa‐Laa and Po pick delicious green beans. The Noo-­Noo puts the beans into the Tubby Custard Machine and out comes tasty, green Tubby Custard!

programme.title: Yakka Dee S06 - EP 9
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'castle', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We visit lots of castles - tall and small castle, a sandcastle and a spooky castle - boo! We see Dee in a castle in the clouds and bouncing on a bouncy castle! And have you ever seen a banana castle before? The journey is repeated with some special surprises along the way, and everyone has a boogie when Dee's friend finally succeeds in saying today's word.
